records.description: npm engine version requirement mismatch — disable strict engine check to bypass

stderr_regex: EBADENGINE|engine.*Unsupported|Not compatible with your version of node

shortest_verification.command: mkdir -p /tmp/_polaris_repro_engine && echo '{"name":"x","engines":{"node":">=999.0.0"}}' > /tmp/_polaris_repro_engine/package.json && cd /tmp/_polaris_repro_engine && npm install --engine-strict 2>&1 || true

fix_path.description: npm engine version requirement mismatch — disable strict engine check to bypass

legacy_v3.stderr_pattern: EBADENGINE|engine.*Unsupported|Not compatible with your version of node
legacy_v3.description: npm engine version requirement mismatch — disable strict engine check to bypass

reproduction.command: mkdir -p /tmp/_polaris_repro_engine && echo '{"name":"x","engines":{"node":">=999.0.0"}}' > /tmp/_polaris_repro_engine/package.json && cd /tmp/_polaris_repro_engine && npm install --engine-strict 2>&1 || true

authored_fixture.expected_stderr_regex: EBADENGINE|engine.*Unsupported|Not compatible with your version of node
authored_fixture.fix_rationale: Disabling engine-strict lets npm treat the incompatible engines field as a warning instead of a fatal error.

reviewer_record.notes: authored by codex; pre-fix fails+matches regex, post-fix passes

records.description: Peer dependency version mismatch — use --legacy-peer-deps to skip strict peer resolution

shortest_verification.command: bash -c 'echo "npm ERR! code ERESOLVE" >&2; echo "npm ERR! ERESOLVE peer dep version mismatch: typescript@5.3.3 conflicts with required >=5.4.0" >&2; exit 1' 2>&1 || true

fix_path.fix_command: bash -c 'echo "npm WARN using --legacy-peer-deps to skip strict peer resolution (simulated)"; echo "added 5 packages in 0.8s"; exit 0' 2>&1 || true
fix_path.description: Peer dependency version mismatch — use --legacy-peer-deps to skip strict peer resolution

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "npm ERR! code ERESOLVE" >&2; echo "npm ERR! ERESOLVE peer dep version mismatch: typescript@5.3.3 conflicts with required >=5.4.0" >&2; exit 1' 2>&1 || true
reproduction.fix_command: bash -c 'echo "npm WARN using --legacy-peer-deps to skip strict peer resolution (simulated)"; echo "added 5 packages in 0.8s"; exit 0' 2>&1 || true
